features.title: Powerful Features for Creating Amazing AI Covers

items.title: Voice Customization
items.desc: Fine-tune voice parameters to match your creative vision. Adjust pitch, tempo, and style to create the perfect AI cover.

items.title: Batch Processing
items.desc: Convert multiple songs efficiently with our batch processing feature. Perfect for creating album covers or content series.

items.title: Video Generation
items.desc: Create engaging music videos with AI-powered lip-sync technology. Transform still images into dynamic singing performances.

items.title: Style Transfer
items.desc: Experiment with different musical styles and genres. Transform any song into various musical interpretations.
